text: I feel a sense of curiosity and mild anticipation as I step into this modern, well-lit space, surrounded by glass and the promise of discovery. Entering the exhibit area labeled "R+D," I'm struck by the energy of innovation—the intersection of research and creativity. The displays invite contemplation on the ever-changing relationship between humans and technology. Here, I feel excited and inspired, as if on the cusp of understanding something new about the world and myself.
